name: Aceternity Sparkles Background
description: An interactive background particle system rendering customizable floating particles, perfect for modern landing page hero sections.

name: BuildUI Magnified Dock
description: A macOS-inspired dock component where icons scale up smoothly based on mouse proximity.

name: Motion Primitives Text Reveal
description: Splits a string of text into words and animates their entry with fade-in and slide-up transitions using standard React animation patterns.

name: Aceternity Glowing Grid Background
description: A glowing grid panel featuring customizable grid overlay accents and pulsing linear gradients, perfect for dark-themed application headers.

name: BuildUI Resizable Panel
description: A container panel that automatically animates height transitions dynamically using CSS custom properties when children expand or collapse.

name: Motion Primitives Magnetic Hover
description: A wrapper component that attracts child elements towards the mouse cursor dynamically, providing feedback on pointer hover.
